summary: Iteration 44: Phase 2 Features Backend Testing - 12/12 tests PASSED (100%). All 5 requested features verified working correctly.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native/Expo app, not web frontend)

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (healing_abutment_cuff_height): PASS - Phase2Submit model (line 285) accepts healing_abutment_cuff_height field, stored in phase2_data (line 2588)
Feature 2 (phase2_supervisor_notes): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2 stores supervisor_notes as phase2_supervisor_notes top-level field (line 2612-2613)
Feature 3 (phase2_incharge_notes): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2 stores incharge_notes as phase2_incharge_notes top-level field (line 2614-2615)
Feature 4 (phase2_student_notes): PASS - POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2 stores student_notes as phase2_student_notes top-level field (line 2608-2609)

Feature 5 (GET returns full phase2_data): PASS - GET /api/procedures/{id} returns complete phase2_data object with all surgical protocol fields including pre_surgery_checklist, anesthesia_adequate, flap_design, drilling_type, prosthetic_component, healing_abutment_cuff_height, torque_values, sutures_placed, hemostasis_achieved, post_op_checklist

seed_data_creation: Approved procedure 69c23603feb06fbdfc09512b to phase1_approved status and submitted Phase 2 with healing_abutment_cuff_height='4mm' and all notes fields for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features backend fully verified. Key findings: 1) healing_abutment_cuff_height field added to Phase2Submit model (line 285) and stored in phase2_data (line 2588). 2) Notes fields (student_notes, supervisor_notes, incharge_notes) are stored as top-level fields with phase2_ prefix (lines 2608-2615). 3) Procedure 69c23603feb06fbdfc09512b now has phase2_data with healing_abutment_cuff_height='4mm' and all notes fields populated. 4) Legacy procedure 69c2361dfeb06fbdfc09512e has phase2_data but without healing_abutment_cuff_height (submitted before field was added). 5) Login endpoint has 5/minute rate limit per IP.
